creator: meta@vmeta.jp
text:
Updating to 1.0.0 can solve the issue.

net/remina, net/remmina-plugins:
  - Update to 1.0.0

net/remmina-plugin-gnome:
  - New port: Remmina plugin for GNOME Keyring

net/remmina-plugin-nx:
  - New port: Remmina plugin for NX

net/remmina-plugin-i18n:
  - Trim header
  - Fix pkg-plist
  - Respect USES

net/remmina-plugin-rdp:
  - Trim header
  - Fix dependency

net/remmina-plugin-telepathy:
  - Trim header

net/remmina-plugin-vnc:
  - Trim header
  - Reset PORTREVISION since PORTVERSION updated
  - Fix dependency

net/remmina-plugin-xdmcp:
  - Trim header

-- 
`whois vmeta.jp | nkf -w`
meta <meta@vmeta.jp>
